name: o3de-lua-runtime-api
description: Generates LuaLS stubs from O3DE runtime-reflected Lua APIs.

commands.title: O3DE Lua: Refresh API From O3DE Editor

o3deLua.remoteToolsTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for the O3DE Editor RemoteTools connection and runtime API responses.

o3deLua.stubOutputPath.description: Optional workspace-relative or absolute file or directory path for generated LuaLS stubs. Directory paths write o3de-lua-api.lua inside that directory. Leave empty to store stubs in VS Code extension global storage so O3DE Asset Processor does not scan them.

o3deLua.updateLuaWorkspaceLibrary.description: Add the generated stub folder to Lua.workspace.library when refreshing stubs.
